highlights.headline: Indiana Pacers vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Indiana Pacers vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Indiana Pacers vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights) 2026/04/03 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Brandon Miller scored 22 points, Kon Knueppel added 20 and the Charlotte Hornets beat the Indiana Pacers 129-108 on Friday night for their eighth victory in 10 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hornets beat the Pacers 129-108 for their 8th win in 10 games

highlights.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/04/03 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Paul George scored 23 points, Tyrese Maxey and Kelly Oubre Jr. each had 21 and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 115-103 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Paul George has 23 points to lead the 76ers past the Timberwolves, 115-103

highlights.headline: Atlanta Hawks vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Atlanta Hawks vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Atlanta Hawks vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights) 2026/04/03 ESHEET

headlines.description: — CJ McCollum had 25 points and seven assists and the surging Atlanta Hawks routed the Brooklyn Nets 141-107 on Friday night for their fourth straight victory and 18th in 20 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hawks beat the Nets 141-107 for their 4th straight win and 18th in 20 games

video.headline: Atlanta Hawks vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

events.name: Chicago Bulls at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Chicago Bulls vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Chicago Bulls vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chicago Bulls vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights) 2026/04/03 ESHEET

headlines.description: — OG Anunoby scored 31 points, Mitchell Robinson had 17 points and 11 rebounds, and the New York Knicks routed the Chicago Bulls 136-96 on Friday night in a game they led by 47 points.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks rout Bulls 136-96 in a game they led by 47 points

highlights.description: Utah Jazz vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 25 points and the Houston Rockets won their fifth straight game, beating the Utah Jazz 140-106 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rockets win their 5th straight, beating the Jazz 140-106 behind 25 points from Kevin Durant

highlights.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Toronto Raptors vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Toronto Raptors vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — RJ Barrett scored 25 points, Brandon Ingram had 17 points and seven rebounds and the Toronto Raptors built a first-half lead, extended it in the third and coasted to a 128-96 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: RJ Barrett scores 25 points in the Raptors' 128-96 win over the Grizzlies

video.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights

highlights.headline: Boston Celtics vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Boston Celtics vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Boston Celtics vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 26 points, Jayson Tatum added 23, and the hot-shooting Boston Celtics capitalized on another fast start in a 133-101 victory over the short-handed Milwaukee Bucks on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtics start fast again and roll to 133-101 blowout of the Bucks

video.headline: Boston Celtics vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights

highlights.headline: Orlando Magic vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Orlando Magic vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Orlando Magic vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights) 2026/04/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Wendell Carter Jr. scored 28 points and the Orlando Magic beat Dallas 138-127 on Friday night, overcoming a 51-point showing from rookie No. 1 pick Cooper Flagg and handing the Mavericks their 14th consecutive loss at home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Magic overcome Cooper Flagg's 51-point night as Mavericks lose 14th straight home game
